rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.33+commit.64118f21"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"account","type":"address"}],"name":"balanceOf","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"to","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"transfer","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"from","type":"address"},{"internalType":"address","name":"to","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"transferFrom","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"FastWithdrawalLP","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Liquidity providers front L2\u2192L1 withdrawals so users skip the 7-day         OP Stack challenge period. The LP earns a fee (configurable, default 0.1%). Flow:  1. User initiates withdrawal on L2 (burn tokens, queue cross-domain message).  2. User calls `claimFastWithdrawal(token, amount, to, withdrawalHash)` on L1.  3. An LP with enough liquidity fills the claim instantly for (amount - fee).  4. When the 7-day challenge settles, the LP calls `settleWithdrawal(hash)` to     recoup their capital from the bridge's finalized release. Security:  - Each withdrawal hash can only be claimed once.  - LP deposits are ring-fenced per LP address; one LP's insolvency doesn't    affect another.  - 33% of fast-withdrawal fees route to the UBI pool (GoodDollar principle).","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/bridge/FastWithdrawalLP.sol":"IERC20"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/bridge/FastWithdrawalLP.sol":{"keccak256":"0xc0ccfac2623e070ecb884fd37af9fb3324be8a4b191282c5c07a10256bb032ee","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://2a80d63a403b93cb3f7be3b9cd7f2bcbfe5858a749afde8eb3899c5aff128faa","dweb:/ipfs/Qmdv9eyKyYfhAy7d2xKNhpn8jNemCyxnFMxexafuDdeMXR"]}},"version":1}
